column1: # Sub-feature coordinates for Arabidopsis thaliana 45S rDNA reference (athal-45s-ref.fa)
# Coordinates are 1-based, inclusive (BED-like 0-based would be start-1)
# Based on Gruendler et al. 1989; Unfried et al. 1989; Unfried and Gruendler 1990; Cokus et al. 2008
# Note: In plants the large subunit rRNA is 25S (equivalent to 28S in mammals)
